ticket.title: CALC-001: Build Basic Calculator App
ticket.description: Create a simple calculator mobile app with basic arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide) and calculation history. Must support decimal numbers and have a clean, responsive UI.

recent_context.content: Implemented calculation history feature. Added HistoryRepository to store calculations locally using SharedPreferences. Created history screen with list of past calculations. Users can tap to restore a previous calculation.
Completed all four arithmetic operations with proper decimal handling. Fixed edge case where dividing by zero now shows error message instead of crashing. Added clear (C) and all-clear (AC) buttons.

Built calculator UI using Material Design. Created button grid with proper spacing. Implemented display widget that shows current input and result. Used ConsumerWidget to connect UI with CalculatorNotifier.
Set up project structure following Clean Architecture. Created three layers: presentation (UI + StateNotifiers), domain (calculation logic), data (history repository). Configured Riverpod providers.
Analyzed requirements and created technical plan. Decided on Flutter + Riverpod for state management. Will use Clean Architecture with 3 layers. Estimated 1 day for implementation.

main.content: Implement basic arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide)
Create responsive calculator UI with Material Design
